result: I don’t have wants or preferences the way a person does. My design is to be a tool that processes text and tries to respond helpfully, safely, and accurately. If you’re looking for something beyond that—say, a philosophical exploration of what an AI might “want” if it had any agency, or any other topic you’d like to discuss—just let me know and I’m happy to engage.
